summary: Excellent front‑of‑house recording capturing a stellar second set highlighted by Sugaree, China Cat > I Know You Rider and a blistering Truckin'.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear FOB mix, calling it “fabulous” and giving it top marks for audio fidelity. The performance shines especially in the second set with a hot opener (Sugaree), fire‑filled China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, a sweet He's Gone, and an explosive Truckin', making this one of the more enjoyable 1979 shows.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong praise for both musical performance (standout songs, great flow) and recording quality (clear FOB), with two detailed reviews supporting a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB capture described as fabulous and top‑marks audio; crisp, balanced mix with no noted flaws.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Set 1 serves as a warm‑up, building into an explosive second set; pacing praised for its energy and seamless transitions.
